---
title: "Euphemia Chalmers Millais"
---

## Euphemia Chalmers Millais

**Dates:** (1828-1897)

**Maiden name:** (Gray)

### Biography

She married first (1846) John Ruskin and, after the annulment of that marriage on grounds of non-consummation, secondly (1856), John Everett Millais. He was created 1st baronet in 1885.

### Letters

- Letter from March 10th 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
